rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract content.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE.
Omit Boolean range clauses when port types are opaque or enumeration-like.
Distinguish component type vs implementation scopes for AGREE annex content.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use eq declarations for range comparisons in AGREE with proper type alignment.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not generate unsafe Boolean range comparisons for opaque data types.
